dashboard.compliance: Data stored in Canada · PHIPA compliant · Encrypted at rest

professionSection.title: Every regulated Canadian health practitioner
professionSection.subtitle: College-compliant tools, billing codes, and clinical templates — built for your specific profession.
professionSection.comingSoon: OTs, Dietitians, Speech-Language Pathologists, and more — coming soon.

problemSection.subtitle: TherapyNotes, TheraNest, SimplePractice — built for American practitioners, storing your clients' most sensitive data on US servers. Your College doesn't accept that.

cards.title: US cloud violates PHIPA
cards.desc: Ontario's PHIPA requires health data in Canada. Most US tools fail this test — leaving you exposed.

cards.title: Enterprise pricing for solo work
cards.desc: Jane App starts at $54/mo. Owl Practice at $89/mo. Built for 10-clinician groups, not solo practitioners.

cards.title: Generic intake forms
cards.desc: Newcomer trauma, racialized stress, cultural identity frameworks — not in any US intake library.

cards.title: Fragmented tools
cards.desc: Notes, billing, scheduling, portal — cobbled from 4 different vendors. MentalPath replaces all four.

bento.subtitle: Built for solo and small-group Canadian practitioners — not a port of a US product.

aiNotes.title: SOAP, DAP, BIRP notes drafted from your session notes — entirely on Canadian servers.
aiNotes.body: Draft, review, sign. Notes locked after 24hrs and searchable across all clients.

billing.title: Official insurance receipts, sliding scale, Stripe, T2125 export.

scheduling.title: Public booking link. SMS + email reminders. Google Calendar sync.
scheduling.body: Reduce no-shows by up to 40% with automated reminders sent 24hrs and 1hr before each session.

portal.title: Secure portal for booking, intake forms, invoices, and encrypted messaging.
portal.body: No app download required. Works on any device. PHIPA-compliant end-to-end.

group.title: Multi-clinician calendars, owner dashboard, role-based access, payout reporting.
group.body: Built for practices with 2–20 clinicians who need shared scheduling and separate billing.

clientMgmt.title: Culturally-adapted intake forms. Full records. Consent management built-in.
clientMgmt.body: Pre-built templates for newcomer trauma, BIPOC mental health, and intersectional frameworks — ready to use, fully customizable.

complianceSection.subtitle: Every architectural decision was made with PHIPA, PIPEDA, and College requirements in mind — not retrofitted, built-in from day one.

points.title: All data stored in Canada (AWS ca-central-1)
points.desc: Client records, session notes, billing — hosted exclusively in Montreal and Toronto data centres. Never routed through or accessible under US CLOUD Act.

points.title: AES-256 at rest · TLS 1.3 in transit
points.desc: Session notes encrypted with therapist-specific keys — even MentalPath staff cannot read your clinical notes.

points.title: College-ready records and documentation
points.desc: Note formats, consent forms, and retention periods aligned with CRPO, OCSWSSW, CPO, and CPSBC requirements. Audit logs for every record access.

points.title: Client consent management built-in
points.desc: Digital consent with timestamped e-signatures. Consent versioning — clients re-consent when your policy changes. Withdrawal recorded and respected automatically.

pricingSection.subtitle: No unit minimums. No surprise fees. Cancel any month.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Try MentalPath with a real client before committing. Full feature access, single client limit.

solo.name: Solo Practitioner
solo.description: Everything a solo Canadian practitioner needs. PHIPA-compliant from day one.

group.name: Group Practice
group.description: Multi-clinician scheduling, owner dashboard, separate billing, shared client management.

testimonials.quote: I was on TherapyNotes for 3 years until my College supervisor flagged the US storage issue. Switched to MentalPath in an afternoon. The culturally-adapted intake templates alone saved me two weeks of work.
testimonials.name: Dr. Abena Osei-Mensah

testimonials.quote: The sliding scale billing feature is exactly what I needed. Most of my clients are newcomers navigating their first year in Canada — being able to set rates per client without awkward workarounds changed how I run my practice.
testimonials.name: Maya Rodriguez, MSW, RSW

testimonials.quote: Switched from Jane App. $65/mo cheaper and the DAP note templates are actually better. My notes are compliant with my College's requirements right out of the box — I didn't configure a thing.
testimonials.name: Dr. Kenji Nakamura
